ResponseTopic: Topic Name for a response message

MessageExpiryInterval: received value minus the time that the Application Message has been waiting in the Server

SendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribe: Send retained messages at the time of the subscribe
SendRetainedMessagesIfSubscriptionDoesNo: Send retained messages at subscribe only if the subscription does not currently exist
DoNotSendRetainedMessages: Do not send retained messages at the time of the subscribe

SendRetainedMessagesIfSubscriptionDoesNo: Send Retained Messages If Subscription Does Not Exist
